title: Blacksteel And More
body:
Adds a new ore called blacksteel, a new villager that can trade blacksteel(to get the villager, use an anvil), Blacksteel orbits around iron in strength. this mod also adds a use for the sculk shard. as well as adding 2 new structures for two new demon blades, Ascaroth and Babael which can only be found in said structures. maybe you can do more with them than combat?

Most textures by Torrezx [https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/torrezx/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/torrezx/) [https://www.curseforge.com/members/torrezx/projects](https://www.curseforge.com/members/torrezx/projects)

ITEM LIST: 

Ascaroth (Sword)

Babael (Sword)

Adralamalech (Sword)

Blacksteel Ore

Blacksteel block

Blacksteel armor

Blacksteel Tools (IE: pickaxe, shovel)

Warden blade

NEW MOBS: 

Withered Creeper

And a new demension, the Underworld

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This tells you how to make the portal

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Place deepslate in a nether portal shape, and ignite using blacksteel hoe

</details>


</details>
